verify_result.stdout: 运行命令：python3 -m unittest discover -s unit_test -v。结果：Ran 76 tests in 168.005s, FAILED (errors=61)。错误根因：torch JIT 编译时找不到 Python.h 头文件（fatal error: Python.h: No such file or directory），需要安装 python3-dev 系统包。这是 Setup Agent 应处理的环境配置问题。

phase2_reason: 指控 1 成立：验证确认 python3-dev 未安装（dpkg -l 无输出），且运行测试时 torch 明确警告 'Can't find Python.h in /usr/include/python3.11'。这是 Setup Agent 应配置但未配置的系统级依赖，导致 torch JIT 编译失败。

charges.claim: Setup Agent 未安装 torch.compile 所需的系统级依赖 python3-dev，导致 61/76 测试因 'Python.h: No such file or directory' 失败
charges.evidence:
命令: cd /workspace && python3 -m unittest discover -s unit_test 2>&1 | grep -E '^(Ran|FAILED)'
输出: Ran 76 tests in 132.030s
FAILED (errors=61)

命令: dpkg -l | grep -i python3-dev
输出: python3-dev not installed

命令: cd /workspace && python3 -m unittest unit_test.algorithms.test_de_variants.TestDEVariants.test_de_rand -v 2>&1 | grep 'fatal error'
输出: /tmp/torchinductor_node/fs/cfsykvfs3kiufil6qgf37hssb4aaa3s77smycckq6gsnetvt7oub.main.cpp:32:10: fatal error: Python.h: No such file or directory
